SEARCH
Package ai.alumnium.driver

Class BaseDriver

java.lang.Object
ai.alumnium.driver.BaseDriver
Direct Known Subclasses:
AppiumDriver, PlaywrightDriver, SeleniumDriver
public abstract sealed class BaseDriver extends Object permits SeleniumDriver, PlaywrightDriver, AppiumDriver
Abstract surface every driver flavour must provide.

Sealed on the three supported backends - Selenium, Playwright, Appium - so that switch pattern matching on BaseDriver is exhaustive.

    • loadScript
